name: Khoisan
description: '''Khoisan''' is a Motswana [[Afro fusion]] duo from [[Gaborone]], [[Botswana]], consisting of Thabang Rasefako and Oratile Kofa. Originally formed in December 2018 as a five-member group under Roc Lefatshe Records, the group reduced to a duo following internal restructuring. They are known for blending modern and traditional African sounds and their singles include ''Marabele'', ''Sethubuge'', ''Sananpopo'', and ''Mpoledise''.
